title: nephelium ternatum
intro: Nephelium ternatum is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the Rambai tree, native to Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephelium ternatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tonics, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
